revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_Catholic_Encyclopedia for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#if:{{{no-icon|{{{noicon|}}}}}}||{{#ifeq: {{{wstitle|}}}||[[File:PD-icon.svg|12px|class=noviewer|alt=Public Domain|link=]] }}}}<!-- 
-->{{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite encyclopedia
  |_exclude=display, id, index, noicon, no-icon, short, wstitle, _debug
  |_reuse=access-date, accessdate, title <!-- these are reused -->
  |_alias-map=authorlink:author-link,origyear:orig-date

 | year = {{{year|{{#switch:{{{volume}}}
   | 1 | 2 = 1907
   | 3 | 4 = 1908
   | 5 | 6 = 1909
   | 7 | 8 | 9 = 1910
   | 10 | 11 | 12 = 1911
   | 13 | 14 | 15 = 1912
   | 1913
   }}<!--EOS-->}}}
 |encyclopedia={{{encyclopedia|[[:en:Catholic Encyclopedia|Catholic Encyclopedia]]}}}
 |url = {{#ifeq: {{{wstitle|}}} |<!--eq to empty-->|<!--then-->
        {{{url|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|http://www.newadvent.org/cathen/{{{id|index}}}.htm}}<!--url-->}}}
      }}

 |title={{if empty|{{#if:{{{wstitle|}}}|{{cite wikisource/make link
             |link=Catholic Encyclopedia (1913)/{{{wstitle|}}}
             |label={{{display|{{{wstitle|}}}}}}
             |noicon={{{no-icon|{{{noicon|}}}}}}
           }}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{Template other|Title}}}}

 |editor-first={{{editor-first|{{#if:{{{short|}}}||Charles}}}}}
 |editor-last={{{editor-last|{{#if:{{{short|}}}||Herbermann}}}}}
 |publisher={{{publisher|{{#if:{{{short|}}}||Robert Appleton Company}}}}}
 |location={{{location|{{#if:{{{short|}}}||New York}}}}}
 |access-date={{#if:{{{short|}}}||{{{access-date|{{{accessdate|}}}}}} }}
 |ref={{{ref|}}}
}}<includeonly><!--no white space
-->{{#ifeq: {{NAMESPACEE}} |<!--is set-->|<!--
     then-->
     {{#if:{{{wstitle|}}}
     |<!--then-->
     |<!--else-->{{#if:{{{title|}}}
       |<!--then-->
       |<!--else-->{{#if:{{{1|}}}
         |<!--then-->
         |<!--else--><!--1
      -->}}<!--title
    -->}}<!--wstitle
   -->}}<!--NAMESPACEE
-->}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

<noinclude>
<noinclude>\n<noinclude>{{Draft categories|

}}</noinclude>
\n
[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>
